{
  "claims": [
    "California faces unprecedented challenges from wildfires.",
    "Impersonating emergency responders during a state of emergency can be charged as a felony.",
    "Wildfires create opportunities for criminals to deceive and exploit vulnerable residents.",
    "Classifying burglary committed during a state of emergency as a felony offense sends a message that criminal behavior will not be tolerated.",
    "The Power Line Safety Act aims to expedite the process of undergrounding power lines to reduce wildfire risks.",
    "Undergrounding power lines can mitigate the risk of wildfires sparked by power equipment failures.",
    "Public Safety Power Shutoffs create unsafe conditions for vulnerable populations."
  ]
